chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA. Cr. Misc; Application No.S-433 of 2023. ______________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE______________ 1. For orders on office objection “A” 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of M.A No.5498/2023 (S/A) 17-02-2025 Mr. Rafique Ahmed K. Abro, advocate for the Applicants. Mr. Muhammad Afzal Jagirani, advocate for the Respondents Mr. Aitbar Ali Bullo. DPG. -------- Learned counsel submits that the parties have patched up outside the court and pray for adjournment to seek such directions for withdrawal of application. Interim order passed earlier to continue till next date of hearing. Adjourned to 28-02-2025. JUDGE
